mapper.select: SELECT pp.id, pp.prompt_id, pp.title, pp.template_body, pp.sort_order, pp.status, pp.created_at, pp.updated_at FROM post_prompts pp WHERE pp.prompt_id = #{promptId}::uuid ORDER BY pp.sort_order ASC, pp.created_at ASC
SELECT id, prompt_id, title, template_body, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM post_prompts WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_prompts (id, prompt_id, title, template_body, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{id}::uuid, #{promptId}::uuid, #{title}, #{templateBody}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE post_prompts SET title = #{title}, template_body = #{templateBody}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND prompt_id = #{promptId}::uuid
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_prompts WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND prompt_id = #{promptId}::uuid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_prompt_variables (id, post_prompt_id, key, label, description, type, sort_order) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), #{postPromptId}::uuid, #{key}, #{label}, #{description}, #{type}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT id, key, label, description, type, sort_order FROM post_prompt_variables WHERE post_prompt_id = #{postPromptId}::uuid ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_prompts WHERE prompt_id = #{promptId}::uuid
